description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker.io/jangorecki/r-data.table Docker image and a postgres service with POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_HOST, POSTGRES_PORT, POSTGRES_USER and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Define a single job named pages (running in the default deploy stage for GitLab Pages) that runs only on the master branch. In the pages job execute: apt-get update -qq; apt-get -qq install -y libpq-dev; R CMD build .; Rscript -e 'install.packages("RPostgreSQL", repos="https://cran.rstudio.com")'; Rscript -e 'install.packages(c("microbenchmarkCore","logR"), repos=paste0("https://", c("cran.rstudio.com","olafmersmann.github.io/drat","jangorecki.gitlab.io/logR")))'; R CMD check $(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1) --no-build-vignettes --no-manual --as-cran; Rscript -e 'install.packages("drat", repos="https://jangorecki.gitlab.io/drat")'; Rscript -e 'drat::insertArtifacts(repodir="public", repo.url="https://jangorecki.gitlab.io/big.data.table", repo.cran=TRUE)'. Publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
